changes.summary: BC-08 InvestInPostUseCase extracted from InvestmentService.processInvestment. inv-08 assertInvestPermission (PermissionService.getUserRoleInCommunity membership, post eligibility, marathon-of-good Birzha rule) runs before inv-01 assertInvestorSolvency (wallet.canAfford). Orchestrates wallet debit, publication pool update, and investment_received notification. createInvestInPostUseCaseFromContext wires publication model from mongoose connection.

BC-13 ProcessTappalkaComparisonUseCase wraps TappalkaService.submitChoice. inv-08 assertComparisonPermission (membership + tappalka-enabled) and assertPostsSolventForShowCost (pool/rating/Birzha/author-wallet eligibility paths mirroring getPair) run before side effects. Uses Nest ForbiddenException/BadRequestException/NotFoundException only; generic Error from submitChoice wrapped as BadRequestException. createProcessTappalkaComparisonUseCaseFromContext wires publication model from mongoose connection.

notes: Attempt 3 confirms write_set use cases complete with permission and solvency gates. investment.invest and tappalka.submitChoice delegate via create*FromContext factories (router wiring outside nominal write_set, present in working tree). eslint/tsc clean on both write_set files. Attempt-2 lint channel failure is from 35 pre-existing issues in auth/communities/permissions/domain files outside write_set. investment.e2e-spec.ts blocked at Nest bootstrap by pre-existing DI cycle from p5-permission-engine-merge.
